pi_items.source: task.json description field confirms 'Locate employee Maria Gonzalez'
task.json description field confirms 'Visa Number: V987654321'
task.json description field confirms 'Country: United States'
task.json description field states 'Expiry Date: 14-Jan-2028', which converts to ISO format 2028-01-14
task.json description field confirms 'upload the file C:\workspace\data\maria_visa_scan.jpg'
task.json description field confirms 'with the title Renewed Work Visa'

pi_items.verified_value: C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB or C:\Program Files\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB
pi_items.source: setup_attendhrm.ps1 (lines 370-374) shows database path candidates as 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB' or 'C:\Program Files\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB'. No evidence of ATTENDHRM.FDB at ProgramData path in any setup script.

Firebird 2.5 documentation and setup_attendhrm.ps1 (lines 348-352) confirm isql.exe is located in the bin subdirectory of Firebird installation. Standard path is C:\Program Files\Firebird\Firebird_2_5\bin\isql.exe

privileged_info_summary: The task updates employee visa details for Maria Gonzalez with visa number V987654321, issued for the United States with expiry date 2028-01-14 (14-Jan-2028), and requires uploading a document titled 'Renewed Work Visa' (filename: maria_visa_scan.jpg). The task description also specifies Issue Date: 15-Jan-2025 and Type/Note: Work Permit. AttendHRM is a Windows-based HRMS application using Firebird database. The claimed database path (C:\ProgramData\Lenvica\AttendHRM\Data\ATTENDHRM.FDB) does not match the paths found in the setup scripts, which reference DEMO.FDB at C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB or C:\Program Files\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB. The Firebird isql.exe path (C:\Program Files\Firebird\Firebird_2_5\bin\isql.exe) is consistent with standard Firebird 2.5 Windows installations.
